---
title: ""
subtitle: ""
author: ""
date: Jul 16, 2026
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
    code-fold: true
    code-tools: true
    theme: cosmo
    fig-width: 8
    fig-height: 5
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
library(tidyverse)
library(baseballr)
library(jsonlite)
```

## Introduction


## Acquire


```{r}
#| label: acquire

season_year  <- 2026
season_start <- "2026-03-01"
today_date <- "2026-07-20"
streak_start_date <- as.Date("2026-07-03")

# ---- Source 1a: Baseball-Reference team game log --------------------------

# All Red Sox game outcomes from 2026. One row for date, win/loss, starting pitcher, attendance, etc. 

bos_games <- bref_team_results(Tm = "BOS", year = season_year)
write_csv(bos_games, "data/raw/bos_team_results_2026.csv")

# ---- Source 1b: Baseball-Reference player stats log --------------------------

#In-depth Red-Sox player stats divided by before streak vs after streak.

#Boston batting stats before streak
before_batters <- bref_daily_batter(t1 = season_start, t2 = as.character(streak_start_date - 1)) |>
  filter(Team == "Boston")
write_csv(before_batters, "data/raw/bos_batters_before_2026.csv")

#Boston batting stats during streak
streak_batters <- bref_daily_batter(t1 = streak_start_date, t2 = today_date) |>
  filter(Team == "Boston")
write_csv(streak_batters, "data/raw/bos_batters_streak_2026.csv")

#Boston pitching stats before streak
before_pitchers <- bref_daily_pitcher(t1 = season_start, t2 = as.character(streak_start_date - 1)) |>
  filter(Team == "Boston")
write_csv(before_pitchers, "data/raw/bos_pitchers_before_2026.csv")

#Boston pitching stats after streak
streak_pitchers <- bref_daily_pitcher(t1 = as.character(streak_start_date), t2 = today_date) |>
  filter(Team == "Boston")
write_csv(streak_pitchers, "data/raw/bos_pitchers_streak_2026.csv")

# ---- Source 2: Official MLB transaction data using API call --------------------------

url <- paste0(
  "https://statsapi.mlb.com/api/v1/transactions?teamId=111",
  "&startDate=", season_start,
  "&endDate=", today_date
)

result <- fromJSON(url)

bos_transactions <- result$transactions %>% 
  mutate(
    player_name = person$fullName,
    to_team = toTeam$name,
    from_team = fromTeam$name
  ) %>% 
  select(-person, -toTeam, -fromTeam)

write_csv(bos_transactions, "data/raw/bos_transactions_2026.csv")
```

## Wrangle


```{r}
#| label: wrangle

```

## Visualize


```{r}
#| label: visualize-1

```

## Communicate


## Conclusion
